subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the retreats of eternity, this most sacred, most holy, most great Abode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر القدم هذا المقر الاقدس الاطهر الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
